description_long: This object is a sushi serving set presented on a rectangular wooden tray. The set includes four pieces of sushi, each with a black seaweed exterior and a white rice filling with a hint of orange, likely representing salmon or another fish. A small, white, polygonal dipping bowl filled with dark soy sauce is placed on the tray. Wooden chopsticks rest on a gray chopstick holder beside the sushi and sauce. The tray is slightly elevated by four small feet, giving it a traditional look. The overall arrangement is neat and visually appealing, suitable for a restaurant or street food setting.
description: A wooden tray holds four sushi pieces, a soy sauce bowl, and a pair of chopsticks on a holder, arranged neatly for serving.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sushi pieces aligned in a row, with the soy sauce bowl at the back and chopsticks on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying all four sushi pieces, the soy sauce bowl to the right, and chopsticks resting horizontally in front.
description_view_2: Rear view with the soy sauce bowl in the foreground, sushi pieces receding into the background, and chopsticks on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sushi pieces and soy sauce bowl, with chopsticks visible behind the bowl.
